EmailTemplate.name: Pricematch
EmailTemplate.subject: Evidence for Price Promise
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
If you have found a cheaper quote elsewhere and wish to submit this for our Price Promise - we will beat any like for like quote* - please send us a screenshot/attachment detailing the competitor name, levels of cover and price. We will then submit this to our underwriters for approval.
*For full details and terms and conditions, please visit https://www.kingsbridge.co.uk/price-promise/.
If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us on 01242 808740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
